summary: Praised as the best‑sounding source and a new favorite, with no specific comments on the performance itself.
review: The reviewer rates this recording four stars and calls it their new favorite for its outstanding sound quality, indicating a clear, well‑balanced audio source. No details are given about the musical performance, setlist flow, or individual band members, so the show cannot be evaluated from this comment alone.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review that focuses solely on excellent recording quality; no information on musical performance, so rating reflects strong sound but uncertain overall show value.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as the best‑sounding source; clear and balanced audio with no noted issues.
